name: agent_capability_filtered_tools_entry_visible_terminal
prompt: Verify the OpenHarness filteredTools-only naming entry.
prompt_lines: Please verify the OpenHarness filteredTools-only naming entry. Use only the read tool if you need to inspect source files. Do not modify files. Check learning_agent/tools/pool.py and learning_agent/tools/catalog_runtime.py. Your final answer must clearly state that filteredTools exists in the pool layer, that current_tool_pool is no longer exposed as a function in either file, that available_tool_schemas uses filteredTools before schema conversion, and that the first-turn tool surface remains read/write/edit/bash/tool_search. The final line must be exactly FILTERED_TOOLS_ONLY_ENTRY_OK.
